_comment: System packages that should NEVER be removed. Removing these breaks Windows or other critical apps.

Microsoft.Advertising.Xaml.reason: Required by many UWP apps; removing breaks app compatibility

Microsoft.WindowsStore.reason: Microsoft Store; removing breaks app installation

Microsoft.Windows.SecHealthUI.reason: Security Dashboard UI; required for system security reporting

dmwappushservice.reason: Required by Windows Update and Intune telemetry

Microsoft.WindowsTerminal.reason: Modern terminal for PowerShell; development tool

Microsoft.Paint.reason: Can be removed if Paint 3D provides equivalent

Microsoft.People.reason: Contact management; can remove if not using Mail

Microsoft.WindowsAlarms.reason: Clock and alarm utility; can remove
